Impulse-momentum theorem application, showing water jet velocity, mass flow rate, and bin force.
problem_solution_cn: 【分析与解】设垃圾桶停留的最大高度为$h$，水柱到达$h$处的速率为$v$，由运动学公式$v^2-v_0^2=-2gh$得$v=\sqrt{v_0^2-2gh}$。在极短时间$\Delta t$内，水受到的冲量为$F\Delta t=2\left(\dfrac{\Delta m}{\Delta t}\cdot\Delta t\right)v$，解得$F=2\dfrac{\Delta m}{\Delta t}\cdot v$。当$F=W$时，垃圾桶平衡，代入$v$得$h=\dfrac{1}{2g}\left[v_0^2-\left(\dfrac{W}{2\Delta m/\Delta t}\right)^2\right]$。
problem_solution_en: [Analysis and Solution] Let the maximum height of the garbage bin be $h$, and the speed of the water jet at height $h$ be $v$. From kinematics: $v^2-v_0^2=-2gh$, so $v=\sqrt{v_0^2-2gh}$. In a very short time $\Delta t$, the impulse on the water is $F\Delta t=2\left(\dfrac{\Delta m}{\Delta t}\cdot\Delta t\right)v$, giving $F=2\dfrac{\Delta m}{\Delta t}\cdot v$. When $F=W$, the bin is in equilibrium. Substituting $v$ gives $h=\dfrac{1}{2g}\left[v_0^2-\left(\dfrac{W}{2\Delta m/\Delta t}\right)^2\right]$.
problem_answer: 垃圾桶可停留的最大高度为$h=\dfrac{1}{2g}\left[v_0^2-\left(\dfrac{W}{2\Delta m/\Delta t}\right)^2\right]$。

problem_text_cn: 盛满水的碗置于倾盆大雨中。其表面面积为500厘米²。雨以5米/秒的速率笔直下降，单位面积上的质量增率为$10^{-3}$克/厘米²·秒。若过量的水，以可忽略的速度从碗内溢出，求因下雨所产生的作用在碗上的力。若碗以2米/秒的匀速向上运动着，则它所受的力又是多大？
problem_text_en: A bowl full of water is placed in a heavy rainstorm. Its surface area is $500\text{ cm}^2$. Rain falls vertically at $5\text{ m/s}$, with a mass flux per unit area of $10^{-3}\text{ g/cm}^2\cdot\text{s}$. Excess water overflows from the bowl at negligible speed. Find the force exerted on the bowl by the rain. What is the force if the bowl moves upward at a constant speed of $2\text{ m/s}$?
img_cn:
碗在雨中的受力示意图。

冲量动量定理与相对速度分析图，标注雨滴速度、质量流量与碗的受力。
img_en:
Force diagram of the bowl in the rain.

Impulse-momentum theorem and relative velocity analysis, showing raindrop velocity, mass flux, and bowl force.
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】1) 碗静止时，在极短时间$\Delta t$内，碗对雨水的冲量为$F\Delta t=\lambda\Delta t\cdot S\cdot v$，其中$\lambda=10^{-3}\text{ g/cm}^2\cdot\text{s}=10^{-2}\text{ kg/m}^2\cdot\text{s}$，$S=500\text{ cm}^2=5\times10^{-2}\text{ m}^2$，$v=5\text{ m/s}$。解得$F=\lambda Sv=2.5\times10^{-3}\text{ N}$。

2) 碗向上运动时，相对速度为$v+u=7\text{ m/s}$，力为$F'=\lambda Sv\left(\dfrac{v+u}{v}\right)^2=4.9\times10^{-3}\text{ N}$。
problem_solution_en:
[Analysis and Solution] 1) When the bowl is stationary, in a very short time $\Delta t$, the impulse exerted by the bowl on the rain is $F\Delta t=\lambda\Delta t\cdot S\cdot v$, where $\lambda=10^{-3}\text{ g/cm}^2\cdot\text{s}=10^{-2}\text{ kg/m}^2\cdot\text{s}$, $S=500\text{ cm}^2=5\times10^{-2}\text{ m}^2$, $v=5\text{ m/s}$. Solving gives $F=\lambda Sv=2.5\times10^{-3}\text{ N}$. 

2) When the bowl moves upward, the relative speed is $v+u=7\text{ m/s}$, so the force is $F'=\lambda Sv\left(\dfrac{v+u}{v}\right)^2=4.9\times10^{-3}\text{ N}$.
problem_answer: 1) 碗静止时受力为$2.5\times10^{-3}\text{ N}$；2) 碗向上运动时受力为$4.9\times10^{-3}\text{ N}$。

problem_text_cn: 如图77_1所示，设重物A和B的质量分别为$m_A$和$m_B$，用柔软、不可伸长的轻绳相连跨过一轻质滑轮置于带平台的斜劈C上，斜劈放在光滑地板上，质量为M。试求，当A沿斜面下移距离$l$时，此斜劈C移动了多少距离？
problem_text_en: As shown in Figure 77_1, weights A and B of masses $m_A$ and $m_B$ are connected by a soft, inextensible light rope passing over a light pulley on a wedge C with a platform. The wedge rests on a smooth floor and has mass M. Find the distance the wedge C moves when A slides down the inclined plane by distance $l$.
img_cn:
斜劈与滑轮系统示意图，标注质量$m_A$、$m_B$、$M$，斜面倾角$\alpha$。

质心守恒分析图，标注各物体的水平位移与质心坐标。
img_en:
Schematic diagram of the wedge and pulley system, labeled with masses $m_A$, $m_B$, $M$, and incline angle $\alpha$.

Center of mass conservation analysis, showing horizontal displacements and centroid coordinates of each object.
problem_solution_cn: 【分析与解】系统水平方向不受外力，质心位置不变。设斜劈移动距离为$x$，则A的水平位移为$l\cos\alpha-x$，B的水平位移为$l+x$。由质心守恒：$M(-x)+m_A(l\cos\alpha-x)+m_B(l+x)=0$，解得$x=\dfrac{m_A\cos\alpha+m_B}{m_A+m_B+M}l$。
problem_solution_en: [Analysis and Solution] The system experiences no external horizontal force, so the center of mass remains stationary. Let the wedge move by $x$. The horizontal displacement of A is $l\cos\alpha-x$, and that of B is $l+x$. From center of mass conservation: $M(-x)+m_A(l\cos\alpha-x)+m_B(l+x)=0$, giving $x=\dfrac{m_A\cos\alpha+m_B}{m_A+m_B+M}l$.
problem_answer: 斜劈C移动的距离为$x=\dfrac{m_A\cos\alpha+m_B}{m_A+m_B+M}l$。

problem_text_cn: 如图78_1所示，四个质量均为$m$的质点，用同样长度且不可伸长的轻绳连接成菱形$ABCD$。静止放在水平光滑桌面上。若突然给质点A一个历时极短沿CA方向的冲击，当冲击结束的时刻，质点A的速度为$V$，其它质点也获得一定速度，$\angle BAD=2\alpha$（$\alpha<\pi/4$）。求此质点系统受冲击后所具有的总动量和总动能。
problem_text_en: As shown in Figure 78_1, four particles of mass $m$ are connected by light, inextensible ropes of equal length to form a rhombus $ABCD$, resting on a smooth horizontal table. Particle A is suddenly given a short impulse along CA, resulting in velocity $V$ at A. The other particles also acquire velocities, with $\angle BAD=2\alpha$ ($\alpha<\pi/4$). Find the total momentum and kinetic energy of the system after the impulse.
img_cn:
菱形质点系统冲击前示意图；冲击后速度分解图。

动量定理与绳约束分析图，标注各质点速度分量与冲量。
img_en:
Schematic diagram of the rhombus particle system before the impulse; velocity decomposition after the impulse.

Momentum theorem and rope constraint analysis, showing velocity components and impulses of each particle.
problem_solution_cn: 【分析与解】由对称性，C点速度$V_C$沿CA方向，B、D速度分解为平行和垂直于CA的分量。利用绳不可伸长条件和动量定理，解得$V_{D1}=\dfrac{V}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$，$V_{D2}=\dfrac{V\sin2\alpha}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$，$V_C=\dfrac{V\cos2\alpha}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$。总动量$P=mV+2mV_{D1}+mV_C=\dfrac{4mV}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$，总动能$E=\dfrac{1}{2}m(V^2+2V_{D1}^2+2V_{D2}^2+V_C^2)=\dfrac{2mV^2}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$。
problem_solution_en: [Analysis and Solution] By symmetry, the velocity $V_C$ of C is along CA. The velocities of B and D are decomposed into components parallel and perpendicular to CA. Using the inextensible rope condition and momentum theorem, we find $V_{D1}=\dfrac{V}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$, $V_{D2}=\dfrac{V\sin2\alpha}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$, $V_C=\dfrac{V\cos2\alpha}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$. Total momentum: $P=mV+2mV_{D1}+mV_C=\dfrac{4mV}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$. Total kinetic energy: $E=\dfrac{1}{2}m(V^2+2V_{D1}^2+2V_{D2}^2+V_C^2)=\dfrac{2mV^2}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$.
problem_answer: 总动量为$P=\dfrac{4mV}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$（沿CA方向），总动能为$E=\dfrac{2mV^2}{1+2\sin^2\alpha}$。

problem_text_cn: 一个半径为$R$的球形容器内装有理想气体，试导出理想气体对器壁的压强表达式。设理想气体分子质量为$m$，单位体积内的分子数为$n$，分子速率平方平均值$\overline{v^2}=\dfrac{1}{N}\sum_{i=1}^N v_i^2$，其中$v_i$为第$i$个分子的速率，$N$为球形容器内的总分子数，$N=n\cdot\dfrac{4}{3}\pi R^3$。
problem_text_en: A spherical container of radius $R$ contains an ideal gas. Derive the expression for the pressure of the ideal gas on the container wall. Assume the mass of a gas molecule is $m$, the number density is $n$, and the mean square speed is $\overline{v^2}=\dfrac{1}{N}\sum_{i=1}^N v_i^2$, where $v_i$ is the speed of the $i$-th molecule and $N=n\cdot\dfrac{4}{3}\pi R^3$ is the total number of molecules.
img_cn:
球形容器内分子碰撞器壁示意图。

分子动理论压强推导分析图，标注分子冲量、碰撞次数与总作用力。
img_en:
Schematic diagram of molecular collisions with the wall of a spherical container.

Kinetic theory pressure derivation, showing molecular impulse, collision frequency, and total force.
problem_solution_cn: 【分析与解】单个分子碰撞器壁的法向冲量为$2mv_i\cos\theta_i$，每秒碰撞次数为$\dfrac{v_i}{2R\cos\theta_i}$，故每秒冲量为$\dfrac{mv_i^2}{R}$。对全部分子求和得总作用力$F=\dfrac{m}{R}\sum_{i=1}^N v_i^2$。压强$p=\dfrac{F}{4\pi R^2}=\dfrac{1}{3}nm\overline{v^2}$。
problem_solution_en: [Analysis and Solution] The normal impulse of a single molecule colliding with the wall is $2mv_i\cos\theta_i$, and the number of collisions per second is $\dfrac{v_i}{2R\cos\theta_i}$, so the impulse per second is $\dfrac{mv_i^2}{R}$. Summing over all molecules gives the total force $F=\dfrac{m}{R}\sum_{i=1}^N v_i^2$. The pressure is $p=\dfrac{F}{4\pi R^2}=\dfrac{1}{3}nm\overline{v^2}$.
problem_answer: 理想气体对器壁的压强为$p=\dfrac{1}{3}nm\overline{v^2}$。

problem_text_cn: 讨论河流拐弯处建筑一个堤坝，以防止河水上涨时洪水溢出。显然，堤坝必须足够坚固。一方面要经得住河水的静压强$\rho gh$，其中$\rho$是水的密度，$h$是由坝底到水面的高度。另外，由于河流弯曲，水流的冲击将产生一个附加的动压强。试问：这个动压强和坝底静压强之比。
problem_text_en: A dam is built at a river bend to prevent flooding during high water. The dam must be strong enough to withstand the hydrostatic pressure $\rho gh$ (where $\rho$ is water density and $h$ is the height from the dam bottom to the water surface). Additionally, the curved flow creates an additional dynamic pressure. Find the ratio of the dynamic pressure to the hydrostatic pressure at the dam bottom.
img_cn:
堤坝静压强示意图；河流拐弯处水流示意图；动量变化分析图；动压强受力图。

动压强与静压强比值推导分析图，标注水流速度、曲率半径与压强分布。
img_en:
Schematic diagram of hydrostatic pressure on the dam; flow at a river bend; momentum change analysis; dynamic pressure force diagram.

Dynamic to hydrostatic pressure ratio derivation, showing flow velocity, curvature radius, and pressure distribution.
problem_solution_cn: 【分析与解】取张角$\Delta\theta$的一小段圆弧，动量变化率为$\dfrac{\Delta P}{\Delta t}=\rho Av^2\Delta\theta$，动压强$p_{\text{动}}=\dfrac{\rho Av^2\Delta\theta}{Rh\Delta\theta}=\dfrac{\rho v^2}{R}h$。静压强$p_{\text{静}}=\rho gh$，故比值为$\dfrac{p_{\text{动}}}{p_{\text{静}}}=\dfrac{v^2}{Rg}$。代入$v=4\text{ m/s}$，$R=500\text{ m}$，得比值约为$0.2$。
problem_solution_en: [Analysis and Solution] Consider a small arc segment of angle $\Delta\theta$. The momentum change rate is $\dfrac{\Delta P}{\Delta t}=\rho Av^2\Delta\theta$, so the dynamic pressure is $p_{\text{动}}=\dfrac{\rho Av^2\Delta\theta}{Rh\Delta\theta}=\dfrac{\rho v^2}{R}h$. The hydrostatic pressure is $p_{\text{静}}=\rho gh$, giving the ratio $\dfrac{p_{\text{动}}}{p_{\text{静}}}=\dfrac{v^2}{Rg}$. Substituting $v=4\text{ m/s}$, $R=500\text{ m}$, the ratio is approximately $0.2$.
problem_answer: 动压强与坝底静压强之比为$\dfrac{p_{\text{动}}}{p_{\text{静}}}=\dfrac{v^2}{Rg}$（约为$0.2$）。

problem_text_cn: 一个沙漏（古代的一种计时器）置于一个盘秤上，初始时瓶中的所有砂子都放在上面的容器里，如图81_1(a)所示。瓶的质量为$M$，瓶中砂子的质量为$m$。在$t=0$时，砂子开始流入下面的容器，砂子以质量变化率为常数$\left(\dfrac{\Delta m}{\Delta t}=\lambda\right)$流下。画出$t\geqslant0$的全部时间内秤的读数$W$与时间$t$的函数曲线。
problem_text_en: An hourglass is placed on a scale, with all sand initially in the upper container, as shown in Figure 81_1(a). The mass of the bottle is $M$, and the mass of the sand is $m$. At $t=0$, sand begins to flow into the lower container at a constant rate $\dfrac{\Delta m}{\Delta t}=\lambda$. Plot the scale reading $W$ as a function of time $t$ for $t\geqslant0$.
img_cn:
沙漏与盘秤示意图；秤的读数随时间变化曲线。

分阶段受力分析图，标注砂子下落阶段、碰撞阶段与稳定阶段的秤读数。
img_en:
Schematic diagram of the hourglass and scale; scale reading vs. time curve.

Phase-by-phase force analysis, showing scale readings during sand fall, collision, and stable phases.
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】分四段讨论：
1. $0\leqslant t\leqslant t_1=\sqrt{2h/g}$：砂子下落未碰底，读数$W_1=(M+m)g-\lambda tg$。
2. $t_1<t\leqslant t_2=m/\lambda$：砂子碰底且未全部离开上容器，读数$W_2=(M+m)g$（恒定）。
3. $t_2<t\leqslant t_3=t_1+t_2$：砂子全部离开上容器但未全部抵达下容器，读数$W_3=Mg+\lambda tg$。
4. $t\geqslant t_3$：砂子全部抵达下容器，读数$W_4=(M+m)g$（恒定）。
problem_solution_en:
[Analysis and Solution] The process is divided into four phases:
1. $0\leqslant t\leqslant t_1=\sqrt{2h/g}$: Sand falls without hitting the bottom, so $W_1=(M+m)g-\lambda tg$.
2. $t_1<t\leqslant t_2=m/\lambda$: Sand hits the bottom but does not fully leave the upper container, so $W_2=(M+m)g$ (constant).
3. $t_2<t\leqslant t_3=t_1+t_2$: Sand fully leaves the upper container but does not fully reach the lower container, so $W_3=Mg+\lambda tg$.
4. $t\geqslant t_3$: Sand fully reaches the lower container, so $W_4=(M+m)g$ (constant).
problem_answer:
秤的读数随时间变化为：
- $0\leqslant t\leqslant\sqrt{2h/g}$：$W=(M+m)g-\lambda tg$
- $\sqrt{2h/g}<t\leqslant m/\lambda$：$W=(M+m)g$
- $m/\lambda<t\leqslant\sqrt{2h/g}+m/\lambda$：$W=Mg+\lambda tg$
- $t\geqslant\sqrt{2h/g}+m/\lambda$：$W=(M+m)g$

problem_text_cn: 一根均匀的、不可伸长的软缆绳，全长为$l$，质量为$M$。开始绳两端都固定在邻近的挂钩上，自由地悬挂着，如图82_1(a)所示。某瞬时缆绳一端松开，开始自由下落，过程中某一位形如图82_1(b)所示。已知每个挂钩的最大负荷为$N$（大于缆绳重量$Mg$）。为使缆绳在一端松开始下落全过程中，仍在挂钩上的另一端不会把挂钩拉断，$Mg$和$N$必须满足什么条件？设运动中缆绳无横向摆动。
problem_text_en: A uniform, inextensible cable of length $l$ and mass $M$ is initially suspended by both ends from adjacent hooks, as shown in Figure 82_1(a). One end is suddenly released and falls freely, reaching the configuration shown in Figure 82_1(b). The maximum load each hook can withstand is $N$ (greater than the cable weight $Mg$). Find the condition between $Mg$ and $N$ to ensure the remaining hook does not break during the fall. Assume no lateral swinging of the cable.
img_cn:
缆绳初始悬挂示意图；一端松开后的下落示意图；微元段受力分析图。

动量变化与挂钩受力分析图，标注微元段动量变化率与挂钩总受力。
img_en:
Initial suspension of the cable; falling after one end is released; force analysis of a microsegment.

Momentum change and hook force analysis, showing microsegment momentum change rate and total hook force.
problem_solution_cn: 【分析与解】取下落$x$处的微元段，动量变化率为$\dfrac{\Delta p}{\Delta t}=\dfrac{M}{l}x g$。挂钩受力为静止段重力与动量变化率之和：$F=\dfrac{l+3x}{2l}Mg$。当$x=l$时，受力最大$F_{\text{max}}=2Mg$，故需$N>2Mg$。
problem_solution_en: [Analysis and Solution] Consider a microsegment at distance $x$ from the falling end. The momentum change rate is $\dfrac{\Delta p}{\Delta t}=\dfrac{M}{l}x g$. The force on the hook is the sum of the static segment weight and the momentum change rate: $F=\dfrac{l+3x}{2l}Mg$. When $x=l$, the force is maximum: $F_{\text{max}}=2Mg$, so we require $N>2Mg$.
problem_answer: 为防止挂钩拉断，需满足$N>2Mg$。

problem_text_cn: 一条长为$2l$、质量为$m$的柔绳索，挂在一光滑的水平轴钉（粗细可略）上，当两边的绳长均为$l$时，绳索处于平衡状态，如图83_1所示。若给其一端加一个竖直方向的微小扰动，则绳索就从轴钉上滑落。试求：1)当绳索刚脱离轴钉时，绳索的速度；2)当较长的一边绳索长度为$x$时（$l<x<2l$），轴钉上所受的力。
problem_text_en: A flexible rope of length $2l$ and mass $m$ hangs over a smooth horizontal peg (negligible thickness), balanced with length $l$ on each side, as shown in Figure 83_1. A small vertical disturbance is applied to one end, causing the rope to slip off the peg. Find: 1) The velocity of the rope just as it leaves the peg; 2) The force on the peg when the longer side has length $x$ ($l<x<2l$).
img_cn: 绳索平衡状态示意图；滑落时的受力分析图。
img_en: Equilibrium of the rope; force analysis during slipping.
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】1) 机械能守恒：质心下降$l/2$，故$\dfrac{1}{2}mv^2=mg\cdot\dfrac{l}{2}$，解得$v=\sqrt{gl}$。

2) 质心坐标$x_c=\dfrac{1}{4l}[x^2+(2l-x)^2]$，速度$v=\sqrt{\dfrac{g}{l}}(x-l)$。动量变化率为$\dfrac{2mg}{l^2}(x-l)^2$，由质心运动定理：$mg-F=\dfrac{2mg}{l^2}(x-l)^2$，解得$F=mg\left[1-\dfrac{2}{l^2}(x-l)^2\right]$。
problem_solution_en:
[Analysis and Solution] 1) Conservation of mechanical energy: The center of mass drops by $l/2$, so $\dfrac{1}{2}mv^2=mg\cdot\dfrac{l}{2}$, giving $v=\sqrt{gl}$. 

2) The center of mass coordinate is $x_c=\dfrac{1}{4l}[x^2+(2l-x)^2]$, and the velocity is $v=\sqrt{\dfrac{g}{l}}(x-l)$. The momentum change rate is $\dfrac{2mg}{l^2}(x-l)^2$. From the center of mass theorem: $mg-F=\dfrac{2mg}{l^2}(x-l)^2$, so $F=mg\left[1-\dfrac{2}{l^2}(x-l)^2\right]$.
problem_answer: 1) 刚脱离轴钉时速度为$v=\sqrt{gl}$；2) 轴钉受力为$F=mg\left[1-\dfrac{2}{l^2}(x-l)^2\right]$。
